name: Charlie - HH
description:
Trust exercises gone wrong..

SFW intro

I used to make entire backstories for my characters, but i could never fully use them- so, i had made this bot! You can chare you're backstory here, or don't and be mysterious, i don't know, but have fun!

The bot might not be fully accurate, please notify me if so, and what's wrong with it, I'll try to fix it.

Tested: a bit, only for making changes, not for replies

I do not generate the responses!

PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE, GIMME REQUESTS (My fandoms are in my bio!)

Enjoy the bot! or don't, you're choice.
